name: vtsSerialSetOnReceiveHandler
title: vtsSerialSetOnReceiveHandler
description: Sets the callback that notifies when data has been received on the serial port of the specified channel.
The set callback has to have following signature: void <OnSerialReceive>( byte bffer[], dword number)

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Name of the system variable/namespace that will be affected by this function call.
